---
name: Bug Report
about: Report incorrect data, typos, schema validation errors, or portal bugs.
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

### Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### Location
Which file, food ID, or URL is affected? (e.g., `data/categories/vegetables.json`, food ID `spinach_raw`, portal `index.html`, etc.)

### Expected behavior
What should the data, translation, or page look like instead?

### Steps to reproduce (if script or portal bug)
1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. See error '...'

### Additional context
Add any other context, screenshots, or validation logs here.
